channel.title: Idea on Taskin's site
channel.description: Recent content in Idea on Taskin's site

item.title: Hoping for a Clearer Tomorrow
item.description: It’s been more than half a decade since Apple decided to let go of the headphone jack from their phones and then (most) other major smartphone manufacturers followed suit. And while Sony phones and the more relatively recently launched Asus Zenfone 9 device still feature it and most lower-end phones still have it, Google decided to do away with it even on Pixel A series not too long after releasing this (ad)[https://youtu.
